channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Offline apps: cache first, sync later
item.description: Cut offline session failure 36% with SQLite cache and pull-then-push sync — conflict resolution, battery cost, and the clinic test that changed our approach.

item.title: Killed a $3k/month K8s cluster for $200/month
item.description: Cut infrastructure cost 93% by replacing a $3k/month Kubernetes cluster with Fly.io for $288/month — actual latency, egress, and deploy metrics from a 12k MAU SaaS.

item.title: Least-privilege AWS IAM in a day
item.description: Cut AWS IAM policy review time from hours to minutes with AWS Policy Generator, IAM Access Analyzer, and condition keys — 5-minute workflow with 12% attack surface reduction proven in 2026

item.title: Meet 2026 SBOM reality: no more hand-rolled scripts
item.description: Cut SBOM generation time 95% with Syft 1.13 — multi-stage, SPDX 2.3, and Grype policies that actually block CVEs

item.title: AI scans your code: real risks and defenses
item.description: Cut false positives 60% with AI scan tuning — GitHub Advanced Security vs Snyk Code benchmarks, confidence thresholds, and the one SARIF trick that saves 34% fix time.
